title: TierKits
body:
### TierKits: Higher Ranks Get Better Kits
A straightforward, permission-based kit system that rewards players as they rank up.

TierKits provides a clean, organized kit system where players unlock increasingly powerful kits as they progress through your server's ranks. From basic starter gear to legendary equipment, each tier provides clear progression for your players.

Key Features:
Clean GUI Menu - Intuitive, glass-paned menu with clear indicators for available, locked, and cooldown kits

Rank-Based Access - Control kit access through permission nodes, perfect for rank progression

Tiered Structure - Organize kits in a hierarchy from basic to legendary

Customizable Cooldowns - Set different cooldown times for each kit

Visual Status Indicators - Players can easily see which kits they can claim with color-coding and symbols

Item Preview - Shows players what's included in each kit before claiming

Command Access - Claim kits directly via command or through the GUI
How It Works:
Players type /kit to open the menu

Available kits show with a green checkmark

Rank-locked kits display which rank is required

On-cooldown kits show remaining time

Players can claim kits with a simple click
Simple Setup:
Drop the plugin in your plugins folder

Configure kits in the config.yml file

Set up permissions with your permissions plugin

Ready to use!
Perfect for survival, faction, prison, and RPG servers looking to implement a clear progression system that incentivizes players to rank up.

Permission Structure:
tierkits.command.kit - Access to the /kit command (default: true)

tierkits.rank.vip - Access to VIP tier kits

tierkits.rank.elite - Access to Elite tier kits

tierkits.rank.legend - Access to Legend tier kits
tierkits.admin - Access to admin control of kits
Easy to configure, lightweight, and designed with both admins and players in mind.
